# Minimal working test
# Just test basic functionality without external dependencies

# Test 1: Basic echo
exec echo "hello world"
stdout 'hello world'

# Test 2: Check go is available
exec go version
stdout 'go version'

# Test 3: Simple environment test
env TEST_VAR=success
exec echo $TEST_VAR
stdout 'success'

# Test 4: Basic file operations
exec bash -c 'echo "test content" > testfile.txt'
exec cat testfile.txt
stdout 'test content'

# Test 5: Cleanup
exec rm -f testfile.txt
exec echo "test completed"
stdout 'test completed'
